location: In an unguarded treasure chest atop the gravestone-covered hill east of Agheel Lake South, beside a green-and-yellow banner in front of the rightmost yellow tent of a small camp watched over by two Kaiden Sellswords.

source.name: Hilltop camp chest near Agheel Lake

tactics: From the Agheel Lake South Site of Grace, head due east and climb the hill dotted with gravestones to reach the camp.
The chest itself is undefended — approaching from the right angle lets you sprint straight to it without ever aggroing the two Kaiden Sellswords guarding the camp.
If you do get spotted, Kaiden Sellswords swing slow but high-poise curved weapons in hard-to-interrupt combo strings — block or space out rather than trading hits.
It's reachable within minutes of starting a new character, making it an easy first taste of the Heavy Thrusting Sword class.
lore: A large rapier with a thin, sharp blade meant for lethal one-on-one duels. Like its smaller thrusting-sword cousins, it's built around piercing attacks and can still be used defensively while a shield is equipped in the offhand.

builds.name: Early-game Quality Dex/Str
builds.why: Balanced Strength/Dexterity scaling and low weight make it an efficient, infusable pick for a Quality-leaning thrusting-sword build from the earliest hours of a run.

builds.name: Duelist sword-and-board
builds.why: Because it can guard while equipped, it suits a one-handed thrusting-sword-and-shield playstyle without giving up much offensive reach.
